title: SVA assertions have false positives when used in a sub-module

features.name: sva assertion with dollar_past in sub-module
features.description: Code should include an SVA assertion using $past() operator on an input signal (en or rst_n) inside a submodule instantiated in a design
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk)
begin
	if($time > 1)
	begin
		assert($past(en || !rst_n) || $stable(word_out));
	end
end

features.name: sva assertion checking register stability with dollar_past
features.description: Code should include an SVA assertion checking signal stability over time using $past() combined with $stable in a non-top-level module

features.name: submodule with registered logic and assertions underifdef
features.description: Code should include a parameterized register module with sequential logic and conditional SVA assertions under `ifdef ASSERT that references internal signals via $past
